title: Test suite
description: A declarative *.test.json suite: the WIT function under test plus its declarative test cases. See common/README.md for the directory convention this format participates in.

function.description: The kebab-case WIT function name under test. Must equal the suite file's stem (e.g. count-tasks.test.json declares "count-tasks").

targets.description: Optional restriction on which execution targets this suite applies to (reserved for Phase 4 file-backed fixtures). An unsupported target is a validation error, never a silent skip.

description.description: A human-readable description of the case, unique within the suite.

input.description: The function's parameters, keyed by WIT-declared parameter name.
